S.text: Follow-up for glaucoma suspect started on brimonidine for borderline/elevated IOP.
Good adherence: brimonidine BID OU, 1-2 missed doses over several months.
Mild intermittent redness and mild fatigue on brimonidine; denies vision changes, blurring, halos.

O.text: IOP 18 mmHg OD / 17 mmHg OS (GAT); pretreatment 24/23.
Optic nerves: C/D 0.55 OU, symmetric, healthy rims, no hemorrhages, stable vs baseline.
HVF 24-2 full and reliable OU, no defects, stable vs prior.
OCT RNFL within normal limits, symmetric, no thinning, no change vs prior scan.

A.text: Glaucoma suspect / ocular hypertension OU, well controlled on brimonidine; no structural or functional damage.

P.text: Space follow-up given stability: IOP check in 4 months; repeat HVF and OCT in 1 year unless change.
